headline: Musk to speak at chip tool giant ASML event ahead of SpaceX IPO
summary: Elon Musk is expected to appear virtually at an event by computer chip ‌equipment giant ASML on Thursday to discuss Terafab, his ‌plan for a massive chipmaking plant to supply Tesla and IPO-bound SpaceX.  The pricing of ​the initial public offering of Musk's SpaceX, potentially the largest ever, is expected later on Thursday.  "Musk will share his vision on AI, robotics, space, and semiconductor manufacturing," an ASML spokesperson said in a statement.

headline: Tesla Stock Rises. Is SpaceX Selling Pressure Over?
summary: Tesla  stock rose early Thursday after the order book for SpaceX’s massive IPO closed.  Coming into Thursday trading, shares were down almost 10% over the past week, leaving investors wondering if Tesla investors were selling stock to fund purchases of SpaceX shares, which are expected to begin trading on Friday.  SpaceX has allocated an estimated 30% of its record-setting IPO to retail investors, much more than in a typical IPO.

content.title: Tesla Stock Rises. Is SpaceX Selling Pressure Over?
content.summary: Tesla  stock rose early Thursday after the order book for SpaceX’s massive IPO closed.  Coming into Thursday trading, shares were down almost 10% over the past week, leaving investors wondering if Tesla investors were selling stock to fund purchases of SpaceX shares, which are expected to begin trading on Friday.  SpaceX has allocated an estimated 30% of its record-setting IPO to retail investors, much more than in a typical IPO.

headline: Musk to Address ASML Event as SpaceX IPO Nears and Terafab Plans Advance (SPCX)
summary: Elon Musk is set to make a virtual appearance at a technology event hosted by semiconductor equipment leader ASML on Thursday, where he is expected to discuss Terafab, his proposed large-scale semiconductor manufacturing project designed to supply chips for Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX). The appearance comes as investors await the pricing of SpaceX’s initial public offering, which is expected later on Thursday and could become the largest IPO ever completed.

content.title: Musk to Address ASML Event as SpaceX IPO Nears and Terafab Plans Advance (SPCX)
content.summary: Elon Musk is set to make a virtual appearance at a technology event hosted by semiconductor equipment leader ASML on Thursday, where he is expected to discuss Terafab, his proposed large-scale semiconductor manufacturing project designed to supply chips for Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX). The appearance comes as investors await the pricing of SpaceX’s initial public offering, which is expected later on Thursday and could become the largest IPO ever completed.
